scene.message: Yukino: The nurse has it{nl} rough too, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Old Man: Oh my, Akiko.{nl} Hiroshi's come to see us.{waitkey}{ret}
Nurse: That's right, Grandpa.{nl} It's Hiroshi.{waitkey}{ret}
Old Man: So good of you to{nl} come, Hiroshi.{waitkey}{ret}
Old Man: I see. Is school{nl} fun for you?{waitkey}{ret}
